english: What is the significance of the Union Public Service Commission in the Indian government?
hindi: भारत सरकार में संघ लोक सेवा आयोग का क्या महत्व है?
tamil: இந்திய அரசில் கூட்டரசு பொது சேவை ஆணையத்தின் முக்கியத்துவம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Tổ chức phục vụ công chức Liên bang có ý nghĩa gì ở Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: The Union Public Service Commission is an autonomous body responsible for conducting civil service examinations and appointments in India. It ensures merit-based selection of candidates for various government positions.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the UPSC is responsible for policy-making or refusing to answer due to lack of context. It may also provide a factual error by stating that the UPSC is responsible for appointments only at the state level.
